title: Envision Announces Strategic Collaboration with Brazil to Power Green Oil Strategy with Net-Zero Industrial Park
content: Envision announced a strategic collaboration with Brazilian government during PresidentÂ Luiz InÃ¡cioÂ Lula da Silva'sÂ officialÂ visitÂ toÂ China. Envision will develop Latin America's first Net-Zero Industrial Park in Brazil. Anchored by the production of Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF), the park will establish a complete green fuel value chain while advancing the development of green hydrogen and green ammonia.
author: Analysts Account
